challenge_summary: Pass 2 verified that accepted fixes REQ-C-01 and REQ-C-03 through REQ-C-09 are present in the revised requirements artifact. REQ-C-02 remains deferred in the decisions sidecar and was not re-raised. No new must-fix or should-fix findings were identified.
compact_for_parent: Pass 2 (comprehensive) | LOW | 0 must_fix, 0 should_fix | Key: no new findings

accepted_fix_validation.evidence: Project Overview includes a Target Environment row for Dev with production-equivalent sizing, and the NFR SLA row binds 99.9% to that environment.
Network Security includes a Public-Edge Baseline compensating-controls table with auth, rate limiting, TLS/HTTPS, diagnostics, suspicious-pattern alerts, and access restrictions.
Recommended Security Controls includes a Priority column and requires Step 2 baseline MVP and secure-plus cost-estimate options.
Farm inventory feeds and Supplier Write Access require Entra External ID OAuth, with API keys limited to exception-only scoped, expiring, rotated, audited use.
NFRs include a Recovery Targets by Component matrix for SQL, Storage, Key Vault, App Service config, and regional outage.
Budget includes a Cost Monitoring & Enforcement table with Azure Budget, 80/100/120 percent alerts, anomaly detection, and parameterized recipients.
Authentication & Authorization includes an Entra External ID tenant provisioning assumption with sizing and ownership/licensing open item.
Complexity Classification rationale distinguishes primary workload services from supporting resources such as VNet, NSGs, private endpoints, Private DNS, budgets, RBAC, and External ID.
Decisions sidecar marks REQ-C-02 deferred; the requirements artifact flags retention by data class as deferred in Recovery Targets and Open Risks.
